# Resource: proxmox_notifications_endpoint_smtp

Manages an SMTP notification endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from_address` (String) The from address for outgoing mail.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the SMTP endpoint.
- `server` (String) The address of the SMTP server.

### Optional

- `author` (String) Author of the mail. Defaults to `Proxmox VE`.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Disable this endpoint. Defaults to `false`.
- `mailto` (List of String) List of email recipients.
- `mailto_user` (List of String) List of PVE users to send notifications to.
- `mode` (String) Encryption mode. One of `insecure`, `starttls`, `tls`. Defaults to `tls`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for SMTP authentication. This value is write-only and will not be read back from the API.
- `port` (Number) The port to be used. Defaults to the standard port for the selected `mode`.
- `username` (String) Username for SMTP authentication.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of this resource.
